meta.title: Professional Profile | MiTepuy
meta.description: Premium professional profile developed by MiTepuy. A modern digital platform for agents, advisors, and specialists in asset commercialization.

meta.og_description: Premium digital presence for agents and professionals.

whatsapp.message:
Hello Maria Gabriela, I hope you're doing well.

I found your professional profile through mitepuy.com and I would like to speak with you about a property that caught my interest in your portfolio.

I would appreciate learning more details, availability, and any additional information you consider relevant.

I look forward to your response. Thank you very much.

services.title: Real estate solutions tailored to your goals
services.description: Professional guidance to buy, sell, rent, or invest with greater clarity, security, and confidence.

items.title: Property Sales
items.description: Strategies to sell your property at the best price and in the shortest possible time.
items.extended_description: I guide you through the entire property sales process, from the initial evaluation to the final negotiation, taking care of presentation, positioning, and communication to maximize the value of the transaction.

items.title: Property Rentals
items.description: Management to find qualified tenants and close secure rental agreements.
items.extended_description: I help promote, filter, and manage your property rental with professional criteria, prioritizing security, contract clarity, and a reliable experience for both parties.

items.title: Investment Advisory
items.description: Guidance to identify real estate opportunities with potential.
items.extended_description: I analyze real estate opportunities based on location, asset profile, appreciation potential, and the client’s objectives to support clearer and more strategic investment decisions.

items.title: Market Analysis
items.description: Key information to make better-informed real estate decisions.
items.extended_description: I conduct comparative market analyses, reference pricing, and area behavior reviews to help you define realistic strategies for buying, selling, renting, or investing.

items.title: Comprehensive Management
items.description: Guidance throughout the legal, commercial, and administrative process.
items.extended_description: I coordinate the main stages of the real estate process, from document organization to commercial and administrative follow-up, so the transaction moves forward with order and transparency.

items.title: Relocation
items.description: Guidance for national and international moves with greater security.
items.extended_description: I guide clients who need to move or settle in a new area, helping them find properties aligned with their lifestyle, budget, and family or professional needs.

about.title: My story, my commitment
about.description_1: With more than 12 years of experience in the real estate sector, my mission is to help my clients find exceptional properties that fit their lifestyle and investment goals.
about.description_2: I believe in transparency, constant communication, and personalized service that builds trust and delivers results.

testimonials.title: What my clients say
testimonials.description: Every review reflects my commitment, dedication, and passion for finding the best real estate opportunities.

items.name: María Fernanda R.
items.text: Maria Gabriela understood exactly what I was looking for. He guided me throughout the entire process and I found the perfect oceanfront home. 100% recommended!

items.name: Andrés Gómez
items.text: His guidance was key to making a safe and profitable investment. Professional, transparent, and always available.

items.name: Isabella De Luca
items.text: Excellent service and attention to detail. They helped me with the entire process from beginning to end. I will definitely work with him again.

items.name: Ricardo Materán
items.text: Great market knowledge and excellent options. I managed to sell my property faster than expected and at the best price.

items.name: Ana Gabriela Torres
items.text: I received close, clear, and very professional attention. Every recommendation was aligned with what I truly needed.

items.name: Luis Salazar
items.text: Thanks to Maria Gabriela, I found an investment opportunity with excellent projection. His judgment gave me great confidence.
